title: NATIONAL PEACE OFFICERS MEMORIAL DAY
summary: NEVER FORGET THOSE WHO MADE THE ULTIMATE SACRIFICE   In 1962, President Kennedy proclaimed May 15  as National Peace Officers Memorial Day and the calendar week in which May 15 falls, as National Police Week. Established by a joint resolution of Congress in 1962...

title: Police Officer Memorial Day May 15, 2026
summary: Never Forget... "The wicked flee when no man pursueth: but the righteous are as bold as a lion" .
